basic_info.title: Final Fantasy VII
basic_info.review: Final Fantasy VII is widely regarded as one of the greatest RPGs ever made, with its iconic characters, emotional story, and innovative battle system setting new standards for JRPGs.

alternative_names: ファイナルファンタジーVII

play_today.details: Official PC port with community mods for improved visuals, performance, and modern compatibility. Requires patches to run on contemporary systems.

recommended_patches.name: FFNx
recommended_patches.description: D3D11/12/Vulkan renderer replacement for DirectX 5, enabling higher resolutions and better graphics settings.

recommended_patches.name: 60 FPS Gameplay Mod
recommended_patches.description: Achieves consistent 60 FPS throughout the game via FFNx integration.

recommended_patches.name: FF7Music
recommended_patches.description: Replaces MIDI soundtrack with accurate PSX audio emulation for better quality.

recommended_patches.name: TrueMotion 2 Codec
recommended_patches.description: Required codec for playing FMVs without black screens on modern Windows systems.

play_today.details: Official PSN remaster of the original PlayStation version. Includes updated controls and online features.
Mobile port of the original game; available on app stores with touch-based controls.
Original PlayStation version running on modern systems via emulator. Requires BIOS and game image.

description.synopsis: A young mercenary named Cloud Strife joins an eco-terrorist group to fight against a powerful corporation draining the planet's life energy, uncovering a deeper cosmic threat in the process.
key_features: Innovative Materia system for customizable character abilities
Branching storylines with multiple endings based on player choices
Iconic character designs by Yoshitaka Amano and music by Nobuo Uematsu
Turn-based combat with real-time elements and combo attacks
description.long_description: Final Fantasy VII, developed by SquareSoft (now Square Enix), revolutionized the JRPG genre in 1997 with its mature narrative, complex characters, and groundbreaking technical achievements. The game's exploration of environmentalism, corporate greed, and personal identity resonated globally, setting new standards for storytelling in video games. Its innovative Materia system allowed deep character customization, while cinematic cutscenes and memorable music created an immersive experience that influenced countless subsequent titles. With over 10 million copies sold worldwide by 2005, it remains a cornerstone of gaming history.
legacy_and_impact: Pioneered the use of full-motion video for storytelling in RPGs
Popularized the Materia system for skill customization across future JRPGs
Influenced narrative structures in mainstream games through its mature themes and character development
Became one of the best-selling games of all time, with over 10 million copies sold worldwide by 2005
Inspired numerous remakes, adaptations, and spiritual successors across multiple media
